feed.description: Recurring guests from other shows revisit their positions.
feed.title: Cross-Show

bullets: Welcome back to Cross-Show. Today we're talking about risk management, and I'm joined by Dr. Elena Fischer, returning systems thinker. Dr. Elena Fischer, thanks for being here.
Walk me through a concrete example. What's the version of the question that actually matters?
Here's how I think about it. Risk lives in the couplings, not the components — same as reliability. We've seen this play out at teams using BloombergNEF. The framing matters because it tells you wh…
summary.raw_text: Welcome back to Cross-Show. Today we're talking about risk management, and I'm joined by Dr. Elena Fischer, returning systems thinker. Dr. Elena Fischer, thanks for being here.
summary.title: Risk Is a Systems Property
